list.name: pc_id
list.label: PC
list.query: SELECT pc_id FROM pc_info ORDER BY pc_id

targets.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, cpu_percent AS "CPU", mem_percent AS "MEM", gpu_percent AS "GPU" FROM metrics_history WHERE pc_id = '$pc_id' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS time, vram_mb AS "VRAM(MB)", disk_read_mb AS "Disk Read(MB)", disk_write_mb AS "Disk Write(MB)" FROM metrics_history WHERE pc_id = '$pc_id' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at
SELECT collected_at AS time, inbound_mb AS "Inbound(MB)", outbound_mb AS "Outbound(MB)" FROM metrics_history WHERE pc_id = '$pc_id' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT detected_at, severity, anomaly_type, COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'final')::float, (scores->>'final')::float, (scores->>'total')::float, 0) AS anomaly_score FROM anomaly_history WHERE pc_id = '$pc_id' AND $__timeFilter(detected_at) ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT aj.judged_at, aj.judgment, aj.severity, aj.reason, aj.action, aj.is_mock, aj.confidence FROM ai_judgment_history aj JOIN anomaly_history ah ON ah.id = aj.anomaly_id WHERE ah.pc_id = '$pc_id' AND $__timeFilter(aj.judged_at) ORDER BY aj.judged_at DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Top 프로세스 ($pc_id, 최근 스냅샷)
panels.description: metrics_history.extra->'top_processes' 가 존재할 때만 표시. 부재 시 빈 결과.

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT extra FROM metrics_history WHERE pc_id = '$pc_id' AND extra ? 'top_processes' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (proc->>'name')::text AS process, (proc->>'cpu_percent')::float AS cpu, (proc->>'mem_percent')::float AS mem FROM latest, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(latest.extra->'top_processes') AS proc ORDER BY cpu DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

panels.title: 이상 점수 분해 — score_breakdown 8키 ($pc_id, 최근 1건)
panels.description: 최근 1건 anomaly_history.scores.score_breakdown 8키 분해 표시. 1단계에서는 일부 키가 0 placeholder 일 수 있음 (B의 채움에 의존).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'resource')::float, 0) AS resource,
  COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'network')::float, 0) AS network,
  COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'process')::float, 0) AS process,
  COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'episode')::float, 0) AS episode,
  COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'correlation')::float, 0) AS correlation,
  COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'ml')::float, 0) AS ml,
  COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'context_discount')::float, 0) AS context_discount,
  COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'final')::float, 0) AS final
FROM anomaly_history
WHERE pc_id = '$pc_id' AND $__timeFilter(detected_at)
ORDER BY detected_at DESC
LIMIT 1
